subject: Carvanha, a small shark-like Pokemon with a blue body and large red spiked fins, surging out of churning water
description: A blue shark-bodied Pokemon with oversized red angular fins radiating from its body like a starburst bursts through splashing white water. Its wide yellow eye and open mouth give it an aggressive, menacing look. The background is a pale teal-green gradient suggesting a shallow water or shoreline environment. The water spray around the creature adds kinetic energy to the composition.
